content.json:
# Trustee Appointment History Metrics

Success metrics for the Past Trustees section on the case detail page.

**Instrumented events:**
- `Past Trustees Section Viewed` — fired when the Past Trustees section renders for a case; measurements: `historyCount` (number of past trustees for that case)
- `Past Trustee Profile Navigated` — fired when a user clicks a past trustee name link (opens profile in new tab)

---
## Section Views
How often users view the Past Trustees section and weekly trend.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Past Trustees Section Viewed"
| summarize ViewCount = count() by Week = startofweek(timestamp)
| order by Week asc
content.title: Past Trustees Section Views per Week

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Past Trustees Section Viewed"
| summarize TotalViews = count()
content.title: Total Past Trustees Section Views

content.json:
---
## Appointment History Coverage
What percentage of cases have appointment history, and how many past trustees are typical per case.

content.title: % of Cases with Appointment History

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Past Trustees Section Viewed"
| extend historyCount = toint(customMeasurements.historyCount)
| summarize
    AvgPastTrustees = round(avg(historyCount), 2),
    P50PastTrustees = round(todouble(percentile(historyCount, 50)), 0),
    P95PastTrustees = round(todouble(percentile(historyCount, 95)), 0),
    SampleCount = count()
| project
    ['Avg Past Trustees'] = AvgPastTrustees,
    ['P50'] = P50PastTrustees,
    ['P95'] = P95PastTrustees,
    ['Sample Count'] = SampleCount
content.title: Avg Number of Past Trustees per Case

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Past Trustees Section Viewed"
| extend historyCount = toint(customMeasurements.historyCount)
| extend HistoryBucket = case(
    historyCount == 0, "0 past trustees",
    historyCount == 1, "1 past trustee",
    historyCount == 2, "2 past trustees",
    historyCount <= 5, "3–5 past trustees",
    "6+ past trustees"
  )
| summarize CaseCount = count() by HistoryBucket
| order by HistoryBucket asc
content.title: Past Trustee Count Distribution

content.json:
---
## Past Trustee Link Engagement
How often users click past trustee name links to navigate to their profiles.

content.title: Click-Through Rate on Past Trustee Name Links

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ("Past Trustees Section Viewed", "Past Trustee Profile Navigated")
| summarize
    SectionViews = countif(name == "Past Trustees Section Viewed"),
    ProfileClicks = countif(name == "Past Trustee Profile Navigated")
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Section Views vs. Profile Link Clicks Over Time
